discovery_insights.title: Three registration touchpoints required per new layer
discovery_insights.description: Adding a new layer requires synchronized updates to: (1) model/*.json data file, (2) api/routers/admin.py _LAYER_FILES dict, (3) model/layer-metadata-index.json layers array. Missing any touchpoint causes silent drift.
discovery_insights.action_taken: Updating all three touchpoints for L122-L129
